title: mentha × piperita
intro: Mentha × piperita, also known as peppermint, is a natural hybrid of the spearmint and watermint plants. It has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce nausea, and alleviate headaches, thanks to its high concentration of menthol and menthone. The health benefits of peppermint include improved digestion, reduced stress, and enhanced mental clarity, making it a popular herbal remedy. Peppermint is commonly prepared as a tea, oil, or capsule, and it can also be used in cooking and as a refreshing breath freshener.
